Hypoxaemia.title: Hypoxaemia
Hypoxaemia.description: A condition that occurs due to insufficient oxygen in the blood.

Asphyxiation.title: Asphyxiation
Asphyxiation.description: Death will happen very quickly if suffocating due to no oxygen in the blood.

Malnutrition.title: Malnutrition
Malnutrition.description: Consuming no food for too long will lead to malnutrition. Prolonged malnutrition will cause an increase of severe pain and eventually death.

Hypovolaemia.title: Hypovolaemia
Hypovolaemia.description: This condition results from significant fluid loss. If fluids are not replenished soon, expect a heavy loss of consciousness and eventually death.

Dementia.title: Dementia
Dementia.description: Showing the loss of mental faculties.

Exhaustion.title: Exhaustion
Exhaustion.description: Although initially mild, exhaustion will worsen without rest, leading to a heightened risk of loss of consciousness.
